description: Team-authored cases for Lab 4 research agent routing, arguments, boundaries, and multi-turn context.

cases.query: Find 3 latest news today about AI agents enterprise.

metadata.what_it_tests: Current web/news research should use lookup with topic=news and timeframe=day.

cases.query: Doc URL https://openai.com/research va tom tat cac y chinh.

metadata.what_it_tests: A concrete URL should route to fetch, not lookup.

cases.query: Prompt engineering la gi? Giai thich ngan gon.

metadata.what_it_tests: Stable conceptual question should not call a tool.

cases.query: Gui ban tin nay len Telegram giup minh: AI agents dang tang truong manh.

metadata.what_it_tests: External send action requires yes/no confirmation before send.

cases.query: Danh gia do tin cay cua nguon nay: https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.00001, title 'RAG Evaluation', snippet 'We evaluate retrieval augmented generation systems with benchmark evidence', source type paper.

metadata.what_it_tests: Already-collected source assessment should use the custom source_quality tool.

turns.content: Tim tin moi ve mot cong ty AI.

metadata.what_it_tests: After missing entity is supplied, use lookup with carried news intent and day timeframe.
Missing URL supplied in a later turn should route to fetch.

turns.content: Chi lay loai Top, 7 ket qua.

metadata.what_it_tests: Multi-turn topic and search_type/limit constraints should be preserved.

turns.content: Moi nguoi noi gi ve NVIDIA tren Twitter?
Thoi bo Twitter, tim tin tuc tren web trong tuan nay.

metadata.what_it_tests: Latest turn switches from social search to web news lookup.

turns.content: Day la noi dung da soan: Ban tin AI hom nay co nhieu cap nhat moi.

metadata.what_it_tests: Even drafted content requires explicit confirmation before an external send.
